If the Moon occupying the 7th house from Venus, or the 5th,
7th or 9th house from Saturn, is aspected by benefics during the
rainy season, there will be rain soon.
[This verse must be read along with the first verse of this
chapter. This is a popular verse often quoted by astrologers.
